title: Montville Country Cabins
description: Rustic option offering country-style wood cabins with kitchens, plus continental breakfast hampers.
address: 396 Western Ave, Montville QLD 4560, Australia
hotelDescription:
Nestled among trees, this rural lodging is 4 km from Montville city centre and 8 km from swimming and picnicking at Kondalilla National Park.
 The 9 elevated wood cabins feature flat-screen TVs and open plan sitting areas with fireplaces, plus kitchens, en suite bathrooms with whirlpool tubs, and balconies with barbecues and scenic views. Complimentary chocolates on arrival and continental breakfast hampers are also included.
 Video rental is available in the reception area. There's a 2-night minimum stay on weekends.
